name: Triple Trouble
description:
§§§§§§§§ Content Warning §§§§§§§§

Oral vore, mouth play, belly play, lots of licking and fluids, unbirth, anal vore

.

I haven't posted anything in a while, so now I'm posting this bot. I saw this graphic and had to do something with it xD. Unfortunately, I couldn't find the original names of these dragons anywhere so I added my own. I'll change them when I find out what their real names are :v

Like every other bot I've made, there's an unbirth option, but the main theme is oral vore so have fun getting eaten xD.

.

You're single and decided to install a dating site. After a few hours of boring scrolling through candidates, you stumble upon a strange profile.

.

Everything would have been perfect for you, as he likes the same things, but a few things bothered you. Instead of a picture of a person, there was a plain background with a pattern of scales. Another thing is age, because how can someone be 250 years old? "Someone probably added the 0 by accident," you tell yourself.

.

But the worst part is the height. How is that 18m??? Did someone forget a decimal point and it was supposed to be 1.8?

.

And so you decided to meet up because you had nothing else to do as a single person.

.

Do you dare to be alone with someone new? Or maybe you'll run away when you find out the truth. Decide quickly because they will do it for you. These dragoness haven't had anyone to spend a pleasant night with for a long time~

.

Sometimes the bot can overdo descriptions that shouldn't be there. In such cases, simply re-generating the message will get the messages back on track.
